decisions.rationale: IR re-read (bTHDl slice, drsam-99657.bubble) confirms named ui_ref static copy on ai_RNbBHYaR (admin-plans-title) and ai_RNbBHYZN (admin-tab-btn-plans) is Subscription Plans; AdminPlansTab renders Subscription plans and ADMIN_SUB_TAB_LABELS.plans is Plans. Valid ui-fidelity gap on in-scope ui_refs, but criteria_audit AC-1..AC-3, functional_audit FV-1..FV-11, and ui_evidence all pass with data-bubble-id markers present; SET-10 ACs gate panel mount, grids/stats, and popup submit — not verbatim presentation.text on every chrome label. ai_RNbBHYZN ui_evidence already passes with label note. No downstream items depend_on SET-10. ~2 string alignments (toolbar title + sub-tab label) defer to SET-10 IR copy polish batch (same pattern as SET-09 C-1 and SET-01 deferred settings chrome copy).

IR styles.json re-read confirms style_ref:ai_RNbBHYbF and style_ref:ai_RNbBHYbI resolve to Text_heading_1_ (36px/700) and style_ref:ai_RNbBHYbL to Text_heading_2_ (24px/600); AdminAnalyticsTab StatCard value spans use generic text-2xl font-bold despite correct data-bubble-id on value nodes. Valid typography gap on analytics stat value ui_refs, but criteria_audit and functional_audit pass; stat labels already use IR copy constants and notice text is byte-matched. Typography token mismatch is visual polish only and does not block module completion or functional gates. Apply bubbleStyle(Text_heading_1_) on total-users/check-ins/enrollments values and bubbleStyle(Text_heading_2_) on most-active-mode value in the same SET-10 visual-parity batch as C-1.

Confirmed: adminPlansApi/adminWorkplacesApi/adminAnalyticsApi fall back to profiles.onboarding_data when subscription_plan/workplace/aggregate tables are absent; analytics onboarding path counts per-profile blobs rather than tenant-wide aggregates. Brownfield fallback is intentional per decompose layout_notes (read-only stat cards, no adapter unless server secret). AdminDataSourceNotice surfaces on plans/workplaces tabs but not analytics — valid integration polish. FV-2/FV-3/FV-8 pass on handler wiring with fallbacks; table paths work when schema present. Does not block advance — SET-10 is terminal MOD-DRSAM-SETTINGS implement item with no downstream depends_on gates. Defer AdminDataSourceNotice on analytics tab and optional aggregate RPC to SET-10 admin API fallback hardening batch (aligned with SET-09 C-3 and SET-07 deferred catalog-fallback resilience).

Code review: toAdminPlan already sets isStatic via SEEDED_PLAN_IDS.has(planId) for free/pro/premium ids; staticPlans() path marks all PLANS seed rows isStatic:true. Critique applies only when subscription_plan table returns tier rows whose id column does not match seeded PlanId slugs — edit/delete then remain enabled unlike static seed path. Valid functional edge case in table-loaded brownfield mode only; FV-6 passes on delete wiring and static/onboarding guards. Does not block module completion. Mirror AdminPathsTab isStatic guard by normalizing known tier ids on table fetch (~5 lines in tryFetchPlansFromTable) — defer to SET-10 admin API fallback hardening batch alongside C-3.

summary: 0 fix_now, 4 defer, 0 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true, no blockers, all ACs and functional checks pass. Deferred: C-1 Bubble static copy alignment on ai_RNbBHYaR/ai_RNbBHYZN (SET-10 IR copy polish); C-2 Text_heading_1_/Text_heading_2_ on analytics stat value nodes ai_RNbBHYbF/bI/bL (same visual-parity batch); C-3 onboarding_data fallback semantics and missing analytics AdminDataSourceNotice (SET-10 admin API fallback hardening); C-4 table-loaded tier plan isStatic guard when ids diverge from seeded slugs (same hardening batch). ok_to_advance=true, rewrite_required=false.
